popularStory.headline: TIBBETTS, Jeremy (1631)
popularStory.description: Jeremiah (Jeremy) Tibbetts was born 1631 as by deposition of Dover Neck, age 4 in 1633, age 38 in 1670, died in Dover Neck in the summer 1677; married by 1655 Mary Canney, daughter of Thomas Canney by …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeremiah Tibbetts於大約1631年出生在英國時，他的父親Henricus Tibbetts36歲，母親Elizabeth Austin36歲。他於1655年與Mary Canney在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 內可結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於從1677年5月5日到1677年6月20日。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeremiah Tibbetts于大约1631年出生在英国时，他的父亲Henricus Tibbetts36岁，母亲Elizabeth Austin36岁。他于1655年与Mary Canney在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福 內可结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于从1677年5月5日到1677年6月20日。

nameMeanings.name: Tibbetts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of Tebbutt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Tibbets
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tebbetts
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tebbutt
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Tebot, a rhyming variant of Ebot, itself a variant of Ibot, a pet form of Isabel. See Isbell and Hibbitt , and compare Tibbett . In some instances it may alternatively be an altered form of the Middle English surname Tebald, Tebaut; see Theobald .

nameMeanings.name: Jeremiah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘appointed by God’ in Hebrew; it was borne in the Bible by a Hebrew prophet of the 7th–6th centuries  bc , whose story, prophecies of judgement, and lamentations are recorded in the book of the Bible that bears his name. The Book of Lamentations is also attributed to him; it bewails the destruction of Jerusalem and the temple by the Babylonians in  587   bc . Despite (or because of) the gloomy subject matter of these texts, the name enjoyed some popularity among Puritans from the 16th century onwards and later Christian fundamentalists, partly perhaps because Jeremiah also preached reconciliation with God after his wrath was assuaged. Since the 1970s it has found considerable favour in the United States.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeremiah Tibbetts was born about 1631, in England, his father, Henricus Tibbetts, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Austin, was 36. He married Mary Canney in 1655, in Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died from 5 May 1677 to 20 June 1677.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeremiah Tibbetts(이)가 대략 1631년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henricus Tibbetts(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Austin(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버 니c크에서 Mary Canney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1677년 5월 5일부터 1677년 6월 20일까지 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeremiah Tibbetts nasceu aproximadamente 1631, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henricus Tibbetts, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Austin, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Canney em 1655, em Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu de 5 de maio de 1677 a 20 de junho de 1677.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeremiah Tibbetts родился около 1631 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Henricus Tibbetts было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Austin, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Canney в 1655 г. в местности довир некк, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер с 5 мая 1677 по 20 июня 1677.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeremiah Tibbetts nació aproximadamente 1631, en Inglaterra, su papá, Henricus Tibbetts, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Austin, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Mary Canney en 1655, en Dover Neck, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió desde 5 de mayo de 1677 hasta 20 de junio de 1677.
